---
blocks:
  - title: About Me
    body: >
      I’m a software engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web
      applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js. I’ve worked on
      production systems in Agile environments, delivering features end-to-end,
      improving performance, and solving real-world engineering problems. This
      includes fixing CI pipelines that unblock teams and optimizing data
      workflows that save hours of time.


      I enjoy building products that people actually use, whether that’s
      high-traffic public-facing applications or creative tools like a music
      composition app I built using Tone.js. My background in music shapes how I
      approach engineering. I value structure, collaboration, and iteration, and
      I’m always thinking about how individual pieces come together into a
      cohesive system.


      I’m especially interested in full-stack development, building reliable
      systems, and continuing to grow as an engineer by tackling complex,
      meaningful problems.
    _template: about
  - title: Technologies
    items:

          name: BiLogoTypescript
          color: foreground
          style: float
        text: TypeScript
